analysis: Ablation with beta=2.0 (higher margin) and alpha=0.5. Achieved 74.87% val accuracy, which is lower than beta=1.0 (75.30%) but still higher than the 74.49% baseline. This confirms that while the margin helps separate confusing classes, over-penalizing similarity can cause the model to lose overall accuracy.
